channel.title: Open-Source on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Open-Source on Arrans github.io

item.title: lingdojo/kana-dojo
item.description: Aesthetic, minimalist platform for learning Japanese inspired by Duolingo and Monkeytype, built with Next.js and sponsored by Vercel. Beginner-friendly with plenty of good first issues - all contributions are welcome!

item.title: mauriceboe/TREK
item.description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.

item.title: f/prompts.chat
item.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

item.title: calcom/cal.com
item.description: Scheduling infrastructure for absolutely everyone.

item.title: janhq/jan
item.description: Jan is an open source alternative to ChatGPT that runs 100% offline on your computer.

item.title: godotengine/godot
item.description: Godot Engine – Multi-platform 2D and 3D game engine

item.title: mikeroyal/Self-Hosting-Guide
item.description: Self-Hosting Guide. Learn all about locally hosting (on premises & private web servers) and managing software applications by yourself or your organization. Including Cloud, LLMs, WireGuard, Automation, Home Assistant, and Networking.

item.title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
item.description: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models

item.title: ministackorg/ministack
item.description: Ministack: Free, open-source local AWS emulator - 35+ services, Terraform compatible, real databases. Free forever. MIT licensed.

item.title: rommapp/romm
item.description: A beautiful, powerful, self-hosted rom manager and player.

item.title: langchain-ai/langchain
item.description: The agent engineering platform

item.title: spacedriveapp/spacedrive
item.description: Spacedrive is an open source cross-platform file explorer, powered by a virtual distributed filesystem written in Rust.

item.title: Cinnamon/kotaemon
item.description: An open-source RAG-based tool for chatting with your documents.

item.title: fleetdm/fleet
item.description: Open device management

item.title: docmost/docmost
item.description: Docmost is an open-source collaborative wiki and documentation software. It is an open-source alternative to Confluence and Notion.

item.title: gitroomhq/postiz-app
item.description: 📨 The ultimate social media scheduling tool, with a bunch of AI 🤖

item.title: continuedev/continue
item.description: ⏩ Source-controlled AI checks, enforceable in CI. Powered by the open-source Continue CLI

item.title: facebook/docusaurus
item.description: Easy to maintain open source documentation websites.

item.title: automatisch/automatisch
item.description: The open source Zapier alternative. Build workflow automation without spending time and money.

item.title: ridafkih/keeper.sh
item.description: Open-source calendar sync tool & universal calendar MCP server. Aggregate, sync and control calendars on Google, Outlook, Office 365, iCloud, CalDAV or ICS.

item.title: Infisical/infisical
item.description: Infisical is the open-source platform for secrets, certificates, and privileged access management.

item.title: F1bonacc1/process-compose
item.description: Process Compose is a simple and flexible scheduler and orchestrator to manage non-containerized applications.

item.title: mfts/papermark
item.description: Papermark is the open-source DocSend alternative with built-in analytics and custom domains.

item.title: getlago/lago
item.description: Open Source Metering and Usage Based Billing API ⭐️ Consumption tracking, Subscription management, Pricing iterations, Payment orchestration & Revenue analytics

item.title: videolan/vlc
item.description: VLC media player - All pull requests are ignored, please use MRs on https://code.videolan.org/videolan/vlc

item.title: basicmachines-co/basic-memory
item.description: AI conversations that actually remember. Never re-explain your project to your AI again. Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/tyvKNccgqN

item.title: bobeff/open-source-games
item.description: A list of open source games.

item.title: endless-sky/endless-sky
item.description: Space exploration, trading, and combat game.

item.title: spacebarchat/spacebarchat
item.description: 📬 Spacebar is a free open source selfhostable discord compatible communication platform

item.title: cocos/cocos-engine
item.description: Cocos simplifies game creation and distribution with Cocos Creator, a free, open-source, cross-platform game engine. Empowering millions of developers to create high-performance, engaging 2D/3D games and instant web entertainment.

item.title: Koukobin/Ermis
item.description: Ermis: A decentralized, secure and open-source messaging platform for real-time communication.

item.title: FossifyOrg/Calendar
item.description: A simple calendar with events, customizable widgets and no ads.

item.title: TrianguloY/URLCheck
item.description: Android app by TrianguloY: URLCheck

item.title: HeyPuter/puter
item.description: 🌐 The Internet Computer! Free, Open-Source, and Self-Hostable.

item.title: pingcap/talent-plan
item.description: open source training courses about distributed database and distributed systems

item.title: givanz/VvvebJs
item.description: Drag and drop page builder library written in vanilla javascript without dependencies or build tools.

item.title: orayemre/Notemod
item.description: Note-Taking App Free & Open Source

item.title: dittofeed/dittofeed
item.description: Open-source customer engagement. Automate transactional and marketing messages across email, SMS, mobile push, WhatsApp, Slack, and more 📨

item.title: requestly/requestly
item.description: Free and open-source API Client & Interceptor.

item.title: bewcloud/bewcloud
item.description: A simpler alternative to Nextcloud and ownCloud, built with TypeScript and Deno. 🦕

item.title: electronicarts/CnC_Generals_Zero_Hour
item.description: Command and Conquer: Generals - Zero Hour

item.title: Authula/authula
item.description: An open-source authentication solution that scales with you. Embed it as a library in your Go app, or run it as a standalone auth server with any tech stack.

item.title: cxong/cdogs-sdl
item.description: Classic overhead run-and-gun game

item.title: MertJSX/folderhost
item.description: Your own private cloud in one executable. Share files, collaborate on code, and manage users without complex setup.

item.title: electronicarts/CnC_Red_Alert
item.description: Command and Conquer: Red Alert

item.title: EgalitarianMonkey/hometube
item.description: HomeTube is a friendly video downloader managing single video URL into organized content structure for automatic home media server experience.

item.title: kekePower/museweb
item.description: MuseWeb is a Prompt Driven AI WebServer

item.title: An-anonymous-coder/Open-Source-Everything
item.description: Open Source Everything: A curated list of the best open source software

item.title: electronicarts/CnC_Tiberian_Dawn
item.description: Command and Conquer Tiberian Dawn

item.title: XandAI-project/Xandai-CLI
item.description: Your offline AI coding assistant in the terminal using ollama and LM studio

item.title: electronicarts/CnC_Renegade
item.description: Command and Conquer: Renegade

item.title: EchoVault/SugarDB
item.description: Embeddable and distributed in-memory alternative to Redis.

item.title: telman03/gocraft
item.description: Create Go projects faster → Auth, DB, gRPC, Docker, Swagger, and monitoring included.

item.title: RayJW/awesome-foss
item.description: A collection of all the FOSS software I regularly use or follow to keep track of privacy respecting alternatives. This is a mirror of a Codeberg repository.
